title: be going to (do)
desc: 계획된 의도 또는 근거 있는 예측
examples: First things first, I have to take a shower. These days on social media, there's something called in everything shower. That means it's a shower where you wash your hair, you do any scrubs, you shave, you literally do everything. So today I'm going to take in everything shower.

Dr. Jart's BB Cream is my absolute favorite. I've been buying it for years, but somehow every time I come to Olive Young, I forget which shade I am. So I'm going to test it. I think I'm medium, but let's see. I love that you can sample the products before buying them at Olive Young.
Finally, I am going to buy some oral rinse or mouthwash. I've been really trying to take care of my oral hygiene lately, and I like this brand because it's quite clean. The ingredients are good.

When I was young, I was one of the first girls in my class to wear makeup to school. I remember doing my eyeliner super heavy and dark, especially the under eye. It was like Avril Lavigne style but not cute.
